description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden cabinet with a simple, blocky design and a pixelated texture reminiscent of video game graphics. The cabinet features a flat, overhanging top surface and two visible drawers on one side, each equipped with a small, square metallic handle. The other three sides are plain, with no visible openings or hardware, emphasizing the utilitarian and minimalist style. The wood grain is stylized with a pixelated pattern in various shades of brown, giving it a digital, low-poly appearance. The cabinet is likely constructed from solid wood or wood composite, with the drawers providing storage space for small items. Its sturdy build and flat top make it suitable for use as a nightstand, side table, or small storage unit in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A small, blocky wooden cabinet with two drawers and a pixelated brown finish. It features a flat top and minimalist design, suitable for storage or as a side table.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain side panel of the cabinet with no visible drawers or handles, highlighting the pixelated wood texture.
description_view_1: Another plain side panel is visible here, similar to view 0, with no interactive features or hardware.
description_view_2: This is the front view, displaying two drawers with square metallic handles, making it the interactive side of the cabinet.
description_view_3: The back panel of the cabinet is shown, plain and unadorned, matching the style of the side panels.
